title: cirsium × mirabile
intro: Cirsium × mirabile, also known as the thistle, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, derived from the cross between Cirsium vulgare and Cirsium pannonicum. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, due to its anti-inflammatory and carminative properties. The health benefits of Cirsium × mirabile include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). Cirsium × mirabile can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs like peppermint and ginger to enhance its effectiveness.
